title: Are OLED TVs still worth the premium in 2026? - Engadget
summary: So it raises the question: Is the "OLED tax" worth it? While OLED TVs are often seen as the premium offering, the other leading panel technology (LCD) has made some major advances to bring its performance closer to OLED panels.
